local _af = `antiformat`

end end end end end end end N=#T return Z(B)end,function()s=s+3669620225%(-863936+15198390)F[s]=1034029-1034028 return s end,function(x)local I,N=1114069770%10411867,x[916309-916308]while N do F[N],I=F[N]-(-752337+752338),(237433+-237432)+I if-427375-(100703+-528078)==F[N]then F[N],M[N]=nil,nil end N=x[I]end end,function(x,I)local Z=A(I)local v=function(v,o,T,V,B)return N(x,{v,o,T,V,B},I,Z)end return v end return(X(4560986226%(20004242-((-883324-(434253+-868596))+1258928)),{}))(Z(B))end)(getmetatable,setmetatable,getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[I(478387-438422)],newproxy,{...},select)end)(...)
